footer.story: Grandpa Jure's house was built by the sea with love and patience. Here, mornings begin with the sound of waves, and evenings calm down under the stars.

cookies.title: Cookies 🍪
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve your experience on this website (analytics and preferences). Read our

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before arrival.

checkin.a: Check-in starts at 14:00 and check-out is until 11:00. If you arrive earlier or leave later, let us know in advance and we will do our best to help.

minStay.a: Minimum stay is 2 nights throughout the year.

parking.a: Yes, free parking for all guests is available right next to the villa. There are no additional charges.

pets.a: To ensure a pleasant stay for all guests, pets are not allowed in the accommodation.

payment.q: How do I pay for the booking?
payment.a: The booking is confirmed with a 30% deposit payment. The remaining amount is paid on arrival, in cash or by bank transfer. Card payments are not available.

beachDistance.a: The pebble beach in Drasnice is 50 meters from the villa, literally around the corner. The sea is exceptionally clean and clear, with an easy entrance.

wifi.a: Yes, fast wireless internet is available free of charge in all apartments.

kitchen.q: Do I have access to a kitchen?
kitchen.a: All apartments have a fully equipped kitchen with a fridge, microwave, kettle, and all necessary cooking equipment.

groupBooking.q: Can I book multiple apartments for a group?
groupBooking.a: Of course - the villa has 4 apartments and is ideal for larger families or groups of friends. Contact us directly for a group booking and special offer.

nearby.a: Very close by, you'll find the beach, a Dalmatian restaurant, and a children's playground. Makarska is a 10-minute drive, Biokovo Skywalk 30 minutes, and ferries to Hvar and Brac depart from Makarska.

bookingPage.title: Booking
bookingPage.description: Choose an apartment, check available dates, and send your request. We will contact you shortly with a confirmation.

faq.title: Booking questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the booking process and your stay.

confirm.q: How do I confirm my booking?
confirm.a: After you send the request, we will contact you within a few hours with availability confirmation and deposit payment instructions (30%). The booking becomes active only after the deposit is paid.

minStay.a: Minimum stay is 2 nights throughout the year.

cancel.a: Cancellation is possible with a deposit refund if notice is given at least 30 days before arrival. For later cancellations, the deposit is non-refundable.

payment.q: How is the remaining amount paid?
payment.a: The remaining amount is paid on arrival, in cash or by bank transfer. Card payments are not available.

capacity.q: Can I request an apartment for a specific number of guests?
capacity.a: Yes. Sky hosts up to 2, Luna and Arba up to 4, and Harmonia up to 6 guests. For larger groups, multiple apartments can be booked - contact us for an offer.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.description: We are here for all your questions - contact us via WhatsApp, email, or visit us in person.

map.title: How to find us
map.description: Drašnice 133, Podgora - 50 meters from the pebble beach, between Makarska and Podgora.

success.title: Message sent!
success.description: We will get back to you shortly.

apartmentsPage.title: Apartments
apartmentsPage.description: Four carefully designed sea-view apartments, each with its own character and atmosphere. Renovated in 2025.

notFoundPage.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Check the URL or return to the homepage.

paymentInstructionsPage.title: Deposit payment instructions
paymentInstructionsPage.description: Your booking becomes valid after the deposit payment is recorded. Please make the payment within 24 hours of receiving the confirmation.
paymentInstructionsPage.note: Note: in the booking confirmation email, you will also receive the exact deposit amount, payment reference, and QR codes for quick payment.

controller.title: 1. Data controller
controller.lead: The data controller is Villa Jurina, Drašnice 133, 21328 Podgora, Croatia.
controller.contactIntro: For all questions regarding personal data processing, you can contact us:

dataCollected.title: 2. Which data we collect
dataCollected.intro: We collect the following categories of personal data:

cards.title: Booking data
cards.body: Full name, email address, phone number, selected apartment, check-in/check-out dates, number of adults and children, notes.

cards.title: Technical data
cards.body: IP address, browser and device type, pages visited - for analytics and website security. We do not use this data to identify individuals.

legalBasis.title: 3. Purpose and legal basis of processing

sharing.title: 4. Who we share your data with
sharing.intro: We do not sell your personal data or provide it to third parties for commercial purposes. We share data only with trusted service providers needed to operate the booking system:

providers.name: Supabase
providers.desc: Database where bookings are stored (EU infrastructure).

retention.title: 5. Data retention period
retention.booking: We retain booking data for 5 years from the check-out date, in accordance with Croatian tax and accounting regulations.
retention.contact: Contact form data that did not result in a booking is deleted within 12 months of receiving the inquiry.

rights.title: 6. Your rights
rights.intro: Under GDPR, you have the following rights:

items.title: Right of access
items.desc: you can request a copy of the personal data we process about you.

items.title: Right to rectification
items.desc: you can request correction of inaccurate data.

items.title: Right to erasure
items.desc: you can request data deletion unless retention is legally required.

items.title: Right to restriction of processing
items.desc: you can temporarily restrict processing of your data.

items.title: Right to data portability
items.desc: you can receive your data in a machine-readable format.

items.title: Right to object
items.desc: you can object to processing based on legitimate interest.

rights.exercise: To exercise these rights, write to villajurina@gmail.com. We will respond within 30 days.
rights.azop: If you believe your rights are not protected, you may file a complaint with the Croatian Personal Data Protection Agency (AZOP):

cookies.title: 7. Cookies
cookies.intro: We use cookies to improve website usability. Cookies are small text files stored on your device.

essential.title: Essential cookies
essential.body: Required for basic website functionality (your privacy settings). Always active and cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics cookies
analytics.body: Help us understand how visitors use the website. Activated only with your consent.

cookies.settings: You can change cookie settings at any time by removing villa-jurina-cookies from your browser local storage, or by contacting us.

security.title: 8. Data security
security.body: We apply technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, or destruction. Communication with our website is protected by SSL encryption (HTTPS). Access to booking data is restricted to the property owner only.

updates.title: 9. Changes to this policy
updates.body: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy. Any significant changes will be published on this page with an updated date. We recommend checking it periodically.

hero.imageAlt: Sea view from Villa Jurina balcony
hero.description: 50 meters from the pebble beach. Sea-view apartments, built with love.

checkIn.a: Check-in starts at 14:00 and check-out is until 11:00.

beachDistance.a: The pebble beach in Drasnice is 50 meters from the villa.

parking.a: Yes, free parking for all guests is available right next to the villa.

minStay.a: Minimum stay is 2 nights throughout the year.

pets.a: To ensure a pleasant stay for all guests, pets are not allowed in the accommodation.

paragraphs.first: Grandpa Jure's house stands right by the sea, where stone and waves have always spoken. He built it with his own hands - slowly, patiently, and with love - the way houses used to be built: to last, to breathe, and to gather generations.
paragraphs.second: Drasnice has always been a place that doesn't seek attention - quiet, modest, and sincere. While nearby towns kept growing, Drasnice preserved what matters most: authenticity, a slower rhythm, and closeness to the sea that is not a backdrop here, but daily life.
paragraphs.third: Here, mornings wake with the sound of the sea, and evenings settle under the stars and the scent of lavender. This house was not created as an investment, but as a home. Today, it opens its doors to everyone seeking peace, simplicity, and the feeling of being in the right place.

gallery.caption: Photos from the family album - memories that shaped this home.

galleryPreview.title: Gallery
galleryPreview.description: Explore our apartments, sea views, and the surroundings of Drasnice.

location.title: Drasnice, Makarska Riviera
location.description: Drasnice is one of those places you remember. A small Dalmatian bay between Makarska and Podgora, protected by Biokovo behind and open to the open sea in front. The pebble beach is literally around the corner - a 50-meter walk - and the sea here is exceptionally clean and clear.

points.beachDistanceText: to the pebble beach — crystal clear sea, a calm bay, no crowds
points.nearbyTownsText: to Makarska, 5 min to Podgora and Tucepi — everything within reach, far from the rush
points.restaurant: Restaurant in the property — Dalmatian cuisine with a sea view
points.hvarSuffix: available from Drasnice — a day trip for an unforgettable experience

surroundings.title: Drasnice - the ideal base for Dalmatia
surroundings.description: Biokovo Skywalk, Zlatni rat beach on Brac, Hvar island, Cetina rafting, Split, Dubrovnik - everything is within reach. Discover more about what awaits you nearby.

cta.title: Your sea is waiting
cta.description: Four apartments, one sea, countless memories. Book today and secure your place in Drasnice.
cta.strip: Minimum stay 2 nights · Check-in from 14:00 · Check-out until 11:00

metadata.title: What to see in Drasnice and nearby
metadata.description: Discover Drasnice and the Makarska Riviera: Biokovo Skywalk, Zlatni rat beach, Hvar island, Cetina rafting, Split and Dubrovnik.

hero.title: What to see in Drasnice and nearby
hero.description: Beaches, mountains, islands, and history-filled towns - all within reach from your base on the Makarska Riviera.

intro.text: Drasnice is a peaceful Dalmatian place on the Makarska Riviera - an ideal base for exploring one of Croatia's richest tourist regions. From turquoise pebble beaches and Biokovo with its famous Skywalk, to the Adriatic islands of Hvar and Brac - everything is within easy reach.
intro.highlight: Villa Jurina is only 50 meters from the beach
intro.tail: and is the perfect base for your adventures.

beach.title: 50 m to the beach
beach.desc: A pebble beach with crystal-clear sea literally around the corner.

makarska.title: 10 min to Makarska
makarska.desc: The center of the Riviera with restaurants, bars, and island ferries.

biokovo.title: Biokovo at your doorstep
biokovo.desc: Skywalk and hiking trails are reachable in less than 30 minutes by car.

hvar.title: Hvar in sight
hvar.desc: The sunniest island is visible directly from the beach - ferry from Makarska.

cta.title: All this awaits you within reach
cta.description: Stay at Villa Jurina - 50 meters from the sea, with a breathtaking view - and explore the Makarska Riviera, Biokovo, and the Adriatic islands at your own pace.
cta.strip: Minimum stay 2 nights · Check-in from 14:00 · Check-out until 11:00

drasnice.title: Drasnice - an authentic Dalmatian bay
drasnice.intro: A small Dalmatian village that still offers peace, authenticity, and clean sea - without crowds and noise.

items.name: Pebble beaches and hidden coves
items.desc: Crystal-clear sea and peaceful coves ideal for swimming, snorkeling, and relaxed beach days.

items.name: Old village of Drasnice
items.desc: Stone alleys, traditional houses, and the scent of lavender create a true Dalmatian atmosphere.

items.name: St. George Church
items.desc: A small seaside church with a calm, contemplative atmosphere and beautiful views of the sea.

items.name: Seaside promenade
items.desc: An easy evening walk along the coast with direct views of Hvar and memorable sunsets.

biokovo.title: Biokovo Nature Park - mountain above the sea
biokovo.imageAlt: View from Biokovo mountain towards the sea
biokovo.intro: Above Drasnice rises Biokovo, one of Croatia’s most impressive nature parks with unique mountain-meets-sea scenery.

items.name: Skywalk Biokovo
items.desc: A glass platform over a cliff with spectacular sea views from nearly 1,000 meters above sea level.

items.name: Hiking trails and viewpoints
items.desc: Marked routes of different difficulty levels with panoramic views of the Makarska Riviera and islands.

items.name: Botanical garden and flora
items.desc: Home to endemic plant species and a surprising botanical garden for nature lovers.

okolna-mjesta.title: Nearby towns - the Riviera within reach
okolna-mjesta.intro: Drasnice is in the heart of the Makarska Riviera, surrounded by lively and diverse places, all within a short drive.

items.name: Tucepi - Riviera elegance
items.desc: A popular seaside town with a long pebble beach, restaurants, and a pleasant promenade.

items.name: Podgora - peaceful and authentic
items.desc: A charming fishing town with local seafood and a calmer rhythm outside peak season.

items.name: Makarska - Riviera center
items.desc: A vibrant town with a waterfront promenade, monastery, nightlife, and ferry connections.

items.name: Igrane - hidden gem
items.desc: A quieter coastal place known for beautiful beaches and a relaxed local feel.

otoci.title: Islands - one-day boat excursions
otoci.intro: Dalmatian islands are close by, each with a distinct character, beaches, history, and local gastronomy.

items.name: Hvar - queen of Adriatic islands
items.desc: The sunniest Croatian island with coves, vineyards, and a lively historic center.

items.name: Brac - Zlatni Rat
items.desc: Home of the iconic Zlatni Rat beach, one of the most recognizable beaches in the Mediterranean.

items.name: Korcula - island of wine and forests
items.desc: Further away, but worth it for its old town, local wines, and rich cultural heritage.

aktivni.title: Active holiday - for guests who want more
aktivni.imageAlt: Kayak at sea - active Adriatic holiday
aktivni.intro: The Makarska Riviera offers far more than beaches, with plenty of options for active and outdoor travelers.

items.name: Kayak and SUP
items.desc: Explore the coastline from the sea with rentals and guided tours available nearby.

items.name: Diving and snorkeling
items.desc: Rich underwater life and local diving centers for beginners and experienced divers.

items.name: Hiking and mountaineering
items.desc: Trails from Drasnice lead into Biokovo, from easy family walks to demanding mountain routes.

items.name: Cycling
items.desc: Coastal roads and uphill routes toward Biokovo offer options for different fitness levels.

izleti.title: A little farther - full-day excursions
izleti.intro: Drasnice is an excellent base for day trips to major Dalmatian and Herzegovinian highlights.

items.name: Omis - Cetina adrenaline
items.desc: Rafting, zipline, fortress viewpoints, and a unique combination of river, sea, and cliffs.

items.name: Split - Diocletian Palace
items.desc: A historic coastal city with Roman heritage, lively streets, and excellent food.

items.name: Mostar - the iconic bridge
items.desc: UNESCO heritage, rich Bosnian culture, and a memorable old town over the Neretva river.

items.name: Dubrovnik - world-famous old city
items.desc: A longer but rewarding trip to one of the Adriatic’s most beautiful and recognizable destinations.

r1.name: Markus & Julia B.
r1.text: A perfect escape for two. The terrace view of the open sea was incredible — morning coffee with the sound of waves and Hvar in the distance. The apartment was clean, modern, and had everything we needed. The beach is literally 50 meters away — we did not need a car all week.

r2.name: Kovac Family
r2.text: Harmonia was perfect for the five of us. Two balconies, sea view from both, enough space for children to have their room and for us to have our peace. Hosts were very kind and always available. We are definitely coming back — this is our new favorite holiday spot.

r3.name: Pieter & Anke V.
r3.text: We found a true hidden gem! Drasnice is peaceful and authentic — no tourist crowds. Kids loved the beach and playground, and we finally had a real rest. The Biokovo Skywalk trip was unforgettable. Apartment Arba — highly recommended!

r4.name: Valentina R.
r4.text: Luna is a romantic apartment that exceeded expectations. Balcony with sea view, tasteful interior, peaceful location — ideal for couples looking for true relaxation. The sea is perfectly clear. Makarska is 10 minutes away, but honestly — we did not want to leave Drasnice.

r5.name: Gruber Family
r5.text: We have stayed here twice already — and we are coming again. The location is perfect: quiet, right by the sea, wonderful view of Hvar. Harmonia is spacious and stylishly furnished. Hosts are always helpful. Biokovo Skywalk is a must!

r6.name: Maja and Tomaz P.
r6.text: Excellent location, quiet apartment with a beautiful view. We would especially highlight the exceptionally friendly hosts — always ready to help. The beach is just steps away, Makarska 10 minutes away, and Biokovo right above the house. A wonderful week we will remember for a long time.
